ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carole Scagnetti for petitioner Martin Halprin

Ms. Scagnetti stated that the petition to close the estate was submitted for filing yesterday, and should be accepted for filing today. The status hearing was continued to March 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
